name: honeycomb
description: Query and explore Honeycomb observability data with secure credential management

honeycomb_management_key.title: Honeycomb Management API key
honeycomb_management_key.description: Format: keyID:secret. Get one from Team Settings → API Keys in Honeycomb.

honeycomb_team_slug.title: Honeycomb team slug
honeycomb_team_slug.description: Your team slug (visible in the URL when logged into Honeycomb)

honeycomb_api_base.title: Honeycomb API base URL
honeycomb_api_base.description: Use https://api.eu1.honeycomb.io for EU. Defaults to https://api.honeycomb.io
